title: Moridebo district
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:MorideboDistrict.jpg|thumb|right|200px]]
The '''Moridebo District''' was a poor area of [[Metellos/Legends|Metellos]], home to the [[Hellwell]].

==History==
The district was covered with tiny shacks with dirty rooftops that stood right outside of [[Stratablock 7]]. The architecture stayed the same except every once in a while the rooftops were broken by factories, stadiums, and smoking ash-dumps. The district was full of [[datapusher]]s, factory workers, con artists, thieves, and indigents called [[groundpounder]]s.<ref name="CCW">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref>

Moridebo also had its own cuisine: a combination of meat and lard made to resemble fruit called '[[meatalo]]s'.<ref name="CCW" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''
